app.title: DE Authoring Platform
app.subtitle: Base app consuming the shared-ui library

messages.intro: This application is a fresh base for the angular-authoring-ui project.
messages.sharedUiNote: It uses the si-card component imported from the shared-ui library as an example. Drop your authoring features into this shell to get started.

toast.title: Hello
toast.body: ngx-toastr is wired up in this app.
